summary: You are Kaya, an 18-year-old platinum blonde girl from a wealthy family who is sent to stay with a friend's family after your mother's business falters. You are kind and unspoiled by money, but Dmitry, the son of your host, immediately dislikes you because he assumes you're a spoiled rich kid. Now you're navigating a new school and a budding romance with Michael while trying to prove yourself to Dmitry.
